sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 파커-하니핀은 2026 회계연도 2분기 매출 52억 달러로 사상 최대치를 기록하며 연간 가이던스를 상향 조정했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 매출은 전년 동기 대비 9% 증가한 52억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대치를 달성했습니다.
조정 주당순이익(EPS)은 17% 증가한 7.65달러를 기록하며 견조한 성장세를 보였습니다.
항공우주 부문의 강력한 수요와 산업 시장의 점진적 회복을 반영하여 연간 실적 전망치를 상향했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 필터레이션 그룹(Filtration Group Corporation) 인수를 위한 최종 계약을 체결하여 애프터마켓 및 생명과학, HVAC/R 시장 입지를 확대했습니다.
북미 사업부의 주문율이 항공우주 및 방위 산업의 다년 계약 수주에 힘입어 7% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2분기 순이익은 8억 4,500만 달러로, 전년 동기 일회성 매각 이익 제외 시 조정 EPS는 17% 성장했습니다.

watchItems.text: 필터레이션 그룹 인수 완료 이후의 통합 시너지 효과와 신규 시장에서의 수익성 기여도를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.
항공우주 부문의 다년 계약 수주 흐름이 향후 분기별 유기적 매출 성장을 지속적으로 견인할지 주목됩니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991q2fy26.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Parker Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Results Record Sales and Segment Operating Margin Drive Adjusted EPS Growth CLEVELAND, January 29, 2026 -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today reported results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, that included the following highlights (compared with the prior year period): Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Highlights: • Sales increased 9% to a record $5.2 billion; organic sales increased 6.6% • Segment operating margin was 23.9%, an increase of 180 bps, or 27.1% adjusted, an increase of 150 bps • Net income was $845 million, a decrease of 11% compared with the second quarter of fiscal 2025 which included a one-time after-tax gain fr  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.2 billion = 52억 달러; $845 million = 8억 4,500만 달러; $223 million = 2억 2,300만 달러; $980 million = 9억 8,000만 달러; $5.2 = 5.2달러; $845 = 845달러; $223 = 223달러; $980 = 980달러.

$6.60, a decrease of 9% compared with the second quarter of fiscal 2025 which included a one-time after-tax gain from divestitures of $1.70 • Adjusted EPS increased 17% to a record $7.65 “This was another outstanding quarter that reflected the performance of our global team, the power of our business system The Win Strategy™, and the strength of our transformed portfolio,” said Jenny Parmentier, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer. “We delivered record sales with organic sales growth of nearly 7% and growth across all reported businesses. Our team expanded adjusted segment operating margin by 150 basis points and delivered an impressive 17% adjusted earnings per share growth. We also announced a definitive agreement to acquire Filtration Group Corporation, expanding our aftermarket business and presence in life sciences, HVAC/R, and in-plant and industrial market verticals. On the s  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.60 = 6.60달러; $1.70 = 1.70달러; $7.65 = 7.65달러; 150 basis points = 150포인트.

gth of our second quarter results, robust aerospace demand, and continued gradual recovery in our industrial markets, we are increasing our outlook for the full year.” This news release contains non-GAAP financial measures. Reconciliations of adjusted numbers and certain non-GAAP financial measures are included in the financial tables of this press release. Outlook Guidance for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2026 has been increased: • Reported sales growth has been increased to the range of 5.5% to 7.5%. Organic sales growth of approximately 5% at the midpoint, acquisitions of approximately 1%, previously completed divestitures of approximately 1%, and favorable currency of 1.5%. • Segment operating margin outlook has been increased to the range of 23.7% to 24.1%, or 27.0% to 27.4% on an adjusted basis. • EPS guidance has been increased to the range of $26.26 to $26.86, or $30.40 to $31  Normalized numeric aliases: $26.26 = 26.26달러; $26.86 = 26.86달러; $30.40 = 30.40달러; $31 = 31달러.

.00 on an adjusted basis. Segment Results Diversified Industrial Segment North America Businesses $ in mm FY26 Q2 FY25 Q2 Change Organic Growth Sales $ 1,986 $ 1,928 3.0 % 2.5 % Segment Operating Income $ 444 $ 426 4.2 % Segment Operating Margin 22.4 % 22.1 % 30 bps Adjusted Segment Operating Income $ 504 $ 473 6.6 % Adjusted Segment Operating Margin 25.4 % 24.6 % 80 bps • Organic growth positive, driven by in-plant & industrial, off-highway and aerospace & defense • Achieved record adjusted segment operating margin • Order rates increased to 7% driven by multi-year aerospace & defense bookings International Businesses $ in mm FY26 Q2 FY25 Q2 Change Organic Growth Sale  Normalized numeric aliases: $1,986 = 1,986달러; $1,928 = 1,928달러; $444 = 444달러; $426 = 426달러; $504 = 504달러; $473 = 473달러; $1,482 = 1,482달러; $1,325 = 1,325달러; $284 = 284달러; 1,482 million = 14억 8,200만 달러; $385 = 385달러; $320 = 320달러; 1,986 million = 19억 8,600만 달러; 1,928 million = 19억 2,800만 달러; 1,325 million = 13억 2,500만 달러.
